title: cynometra psilogyne
intro: Cynometra psilogyne, also known as the 'Yellow Ebony', is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. Its bark, leaves, and seeds possess medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits associated with Cynometra psilogyne include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in reducing pain and fighting infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and decoctions made from its bark and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for wound healing and skin conditions.
